name: x-purge
description: Automated post deletion for X (Twitter). Easily reclaim your privacy by clearing your timeline in bulk.

scripts.minify: esbuild dist/*.js dist/*.css --minify --allow-overwrite --outdir=dist && html-minifier-terser --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments dist/popup.html -o dist/popup.html
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r src/* dist/ && npm run minify
